title: Missing Texture Block
description: This mod adds Missing Texture Block.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BBCSgkwA/images/030a3a8032ff154e488c2144ab3d077ead58d84b.png)  
This mod adds craftable Missing Texture Blocks to Minecraft. 

## Missing Texture Block
* Can be crafted using **Black Concrete** and **Magenta Concrete**.
* Has the same hardness and blast resistance as concrete.
* Is transparent on the map.
* Has six variants.

## Missing Texture Wand
* [1.19.4 and above.] Can be crafted using **Popped Chorus Fruit**, **Dragon Breath** and **End Rod**.
* [1.19.2 and below.] Has a 2% chance of being found in end city treasure.
* Can replace any block with a special missing texture block that decays over time.
* Do not break after using up all charges, which can be recharged with any type of missing texture blocks.

## Credit
* Missing Texture Block Type D, E and F were suggested by [AmboNec](https://www.curseforge.com/members/ambonec/projects).


```
Enjoy decorating your world with missing texture blocks.
```
